features.name: list integer type with mixed-width integer operands
features.description: Code should include a List<Integer> construction where list operands have different integer bit widths
features.snippet:
input propIn : Integer
output propOut : List<Integer>
propassign propOut, List<Integer>(propIn, Integer(123))

features.name: om.list_create with type-inconsistent operands
features.description: Code should include an om.list_create operation where operands have different integer types (e.g., i64 vs si12)

features.name: om.constant with different bit widths for same integer type
features.description: Code should include om.constant operations producing different bit-width integers (si12 vs i64) that are used as list operands
